title: Annual Spring Hackathon 2024
description:
Join us for the most anticipated tech event of the semester! The Annual Spring Hackathon brings together industry leaders, innovative researchers, and passionate students for a day of inspiration and networking.

This year's theme focuses on 'Building Tomorrow' and features keynote speakers from top tech firms, interactive workshops, and a project showcase where students can present their latest work to potential employers.

title: Visual Arts Showcase
description:
Celebrate student creativity at our Annual Visual Arts Showcase. From paintings to digital art, explore diverse artistic expressions from talented students. Meet the artists and learn about their creative process.

Featuring works from photography, sculpture, digital design, and traditional mediums. All campus members welcome!

title: Inter-Collegiate Frisbee Finals
description:
Watch the most exciting ultimate frisbee championship of the year! Cheer for your favorite teams as they compete in the final tournament. High energy, amazing plays, and great atmosphere guaranteed!

Free snacks and drinks for attendees. Multiple teams from different colleges competing!

title: Web Development Workshop Series
description:
Learn modern web development from industry experts! This comprehensive workshop series covers React, Node.js, and full-stack development. Perfect for beginners and intermediate developers.

Participants will build a real project and receive certificates upon completion.

title: Annual Sports Day
description:
The biggest sports festival of the year! Features various sports including basketball, volleyball, cricket, and relay races. Open to all students regardless of skill level.

Registrations now open! Form your team and compete for prizes and glory!

title: Music & Performance Night
description:
Enjoy amazing performances by student musicians, dancers, and artists! From classical to contemporary, from Indian to western music. A spectacular evening of entertainment.

Free entry for all students. Refreshments will be served.
